overall.description: Futuristic urban highway driving scene from a video game, featuring steady forward motion along an elevated multi-lane road with distinctive cyberpunk architecture, digital billboards, and moderate vehicle traffic under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with safety barriers

agents.ego_description: driving steadily in the left lane of an elevated highway, maintaining consistent speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving in the same direction ahead

entered.detail: large black industrial building with vertical white 'DATATERM' signage
tall yellow and black industrial tower with '04' marking
metal safety barrier with yellow and black diagonal stripes
large red billboard with 'CIRRUS COLA' text

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic elevated highway with the camera driving forward in the left lane. A massive black industrial building labeled 'DATATERM' dominates the left side, while a distinctive yellow tower marked '04' stands in the distance ahead. Metal safety railings with hazard stripes line the left edge, and various vehicles pass by in moderate traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway section with large advertising billboards on left

events.description: passing from open railing section into billboard-lined corridor on left side

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive forward past large advertisements on the left side

entered.detail: large yellow billboard with red muscular figure and 'FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS' text
advertisement featuring a woman's face with blue eyeshadow and 'ABY DOS' beer bottle

segments.scene_description: The camera drives past a series of large digital billboards on the left, including a prominent yellow 'FOLLOW YOUR INSTINCTS' advertisement and a beer commercial. The safety railing is temporarily obscured by these large structures, while the DATATERM building recedes into the distance and the yellow tower remains visible ahead.

events.description: exiting billboard corridor and returning to open railing view

agents.ego_description: driving forward with increasing traffic density, passing various sedans and trucks

notable_agents.action: large truck driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: metal safety barrier with yellow and black diagonal stripes

segments.scene_description: After passing the billboards, the scene returns to the open highway view with the safety railing visible again. The DATATERM building appears closer on the left, and the yellow tower marked '04' grows larger as the camera approaches. Various vehicles including a large truck are visible ahead on the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway passing industrial complex with processing towers

events.description: camera drifts toward the right lane, revealing the industrial complex on the right side

agents.ego_description: driving forward while shifting toward the right lane, approaching the industrial tower complex

entered.detail: large green industrial processing facility with multiple tanks and pipes

segments.scene_description: The camera shifts toward the right lane, bringing a large green industrial complex into view on the right side while the CIRRUS COLA billboard passes by closely. The yellow tower '04' looms large ahead as the camera approaches, and the DATATERM building recedes into the distance on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward drive along a futuristic elevated highway that transitions from a view dominated by industrial monoliths to a close approach of a towering urban spire. It begins in the left lane beside a massive black DATATERM building and hazard-striped railings, with a yellow tower marked 04 visible in the far distance. As the camera moves forward, the view is momentarily framed by a series of large digital billboards, including a yellow advertisement and a beer commercial, which obscure the roadside before the open highway vista returns. The scene then shifts as the camera glides toward the right lane, passing a Cirrus Cola billboard and bringing a large green industrial complex into view. Finally, the DATATERM building recedes into the distance while the yellow tower looms large directly ahead, dominating the horizon.
